name: Botan
description: Botan is Kyou's pet boar. Despite loving her owner, Botan hates and fears her twin sister Ryou, since she once tried to get her into the bath with her, which she mistook for an attempt of cooking her alive. Botan is well known for her catchphrase "Puhi-Puhi", the sounds that she makes. (Source: Fandom)

name: Chae-Eun Seol
description: [Chae-Won](https://anilist.co/character/249254)'s younger sister who's preparing to retake the exam.

name: Cheong-Yeon Lee
description: A computer engineering major at Yeon Gol university. She is religious and takes an interest on Mai. ~!She and Mai start dating at the end of Season 1!~

name: Cheza
description: Cheza is the Flower Maiden, a girl who was artificially created from a Lunar Flower by the noble Darcia the First using the lost art of alchemy. First appearing in a state of suspended animation within a scientific research lab, she was awakened by the smell of wolf's blood spilled in the brief fight between Tsume and Kiba. After the wolves steal her away, she is pursued by various other characters, forcing the pack to protect her constantly. She shares a special bond with the wolves and is the

name: Chinu Kawakubo
description: **Height:** 165 cm Chinu Kawakubo is a famous water polo player who is featured in the media. She knows about Minato Kiyomizu's past.

name: Chisame Hasegawa
description: __Seat Number:__ 25 Chisame Hasegawa is the grumpy, unsocial computer hacker of the class, intentionally isolating herself due to her dislike of freaks and weirdos. However, Chisame secretly lives a double life as the famous web idol Chiu, where she can be popular without putting up with the local idiots. She likes small, powerful devices, such as sub-notepad PCs, but dislikes useless people and unexpected events. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Chizuru Aizawa
description: Chizuru is the proud owner and manager of the Lemon Beach House. She is [Eiko Aizawa](https://anilist.co/character/34653/Eiko-Aizawa) and [Takeru Aizawa's](https://anilist.co/character/37242/Takeru-Aizawa) eldest sister. Unlike her sister, Chizuru is much calmer and cares more for [Ika](https://anilist.co/character/20512/Ika-Musume). She tends to be more quiet and reserved, and she's almost always shown with shut eyes and a smile no matter the situation. However, if something occurs which she do

name: D
description: D is a god. ~! D is responsible for the reincarnation of the class that was killed at​ the beginning of the story.!~ ~!The name of their temporary human form is Wakaba Hiiro (若 葉 姫 色)!~

Though he commands a great deal of respect, he is occasionally called "Monkey Man" (in the Manga) by his subordinates (perhaps because of his unconventional hairstyle/face). name: Dominic Sorel
description: Dominic Sorel is the youngest to be second lieutenant and Dewey's subordinate. He is assigned to Anemone to tend to her needs and monitor her physical and mental condition. It's never explained why Dominic was promoted so fast, especially given his occasional naivete. There are men in the military far older than him and yet of much lower rank, who often have trouble obeying his orders. name: Eri
description: Eri is a woman who previously lived with Shun and his grandmother in Okinawa before moving out to live with her girlfriend, Suzu.

name: Eru Aharen
description: She is Aharen Reina's younger sister

name: Genzo Shibata
description: Genzo Shibata, aka the Kemona Mask, is a professional wrestler who dreamed of opening his own pet shop.

name: Guy Christophe Rech
nativeName: ギイ・クリストフ・レッシュ
description: A french _dandy_ living in Paris and one of the most powerful puppet master ever known. He's nicknamed "Olympia's fiancé" after his puppet's surname. He may look childish or funny but he is in fact indifferent to whatever may happen under his eyes, as if he didn't have a heart. He first appears in volume 7 ~!when he saves Narumi and in return force him to join the Shiroganes in order to destroy the Automatons. !~

name: Hee-Soo Yoon
description: Hee-Soo is a beta that is denominated lackey of the family Park. He follows Do-Jin everywhere, calling him a young master. He does not seem to like Hye-Sung and totally disapproves of his master having any relationship with him.

name: Himawari Kunogi
description: Watanuki's main love interest. He has been infatuated with Himawari ever since the beginning of the series and even some cryptic remarks from Yūko like "are you sure she's good luck?" haven't deterred him. Himawari is caring and kind towards Watanuki, but she has her own reasons in avoiding him becoming closer to her. For some reason she was born with the power to cause serious misfortune (although unintended) to those around her, an issue that even brought death to her grandmother and sometimes

name: Inazuma
description: __Devil Fruit:__ Choki Choki no Mi (Snip-Snip Fruit) __Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia Inazuma is a Revolutionary, originated from South Blue, and is an okama who serves under Emporio Ivankov in Impel Down. Because of Iva's gender changing powers, Inazuma has both appeared as a man and as a woman.

name: Irvine
description: Irvine is a prominent archer in the new Band of the Hawks. He has never spoken to anyone on page but Sonia. His eyes have neither pupils nor irises. A self-described hunter and loner, he prefers to camp out in the woods whilst indulging in his only known pleasure: playing the lute by the campfire. Irvine's precision with the bow is peerless.
